keywords.name: I am Anerui Mourningleaf.
keywords.job: I am the mistress of the hunt. At this place you may buy the food our hunts provide.
keywords.time: Watch the sky, it will tell you.
keywords.carlin: Carlin needs our protection and resources. Of course they will turn on us as soon as they feel strong enough.
keywords.thais: Thais is to far away to prove a threat but also is of little help if problems should occur.
keywords.venore: Venore profits greatly from the trade with Ab'Denriel. I see those traders as leeches that suck away our resources.
keywords.roderick: He is our contact person to the thaian kingdom and a necessary evil.
keywords.olrik: He would love to be an elf but still is more kind of a pale orc.
keywords.hunter: Hunters live a life of freedom and closeness to nature, unlike a simple farmer or bugherder.
keywords.hunt: Hunting is an art, practiced too often by diletantes. Every fool with a bow or a spear considers himself a hunter.
keywords.game: Hunting is an art, practiced too often by diletantes. Every fool with a bow or a spear considers himself a hunter.
keywords.prey: Hunting is an art, practiced too often by diletantes. Every fool with a bow or a spear considers himself a hunter.
keywords.forest: The forests are the gardens of life. Nature provides enough for everyone's need, but not enough for everyone's greed.
keywords.nature: Nature is not a friend but an unforgiving teacher, and the lessons we have to learn are endless.
keywords.teacher: Most lessons nature teaches are about life and death.
keywords.life: Life and death are significant parts of the balance.
keywords.death: Life and death are significant parts of the balance.
keywords.balance: The balance of nature, of course. It's everywhere, so don't ask but observe and learn.
keywords.bugherder: Well, a person who herds bugs of course.
keywords.bugs: The bugs provide us with chitin for equipment, bugmilk, and bugmeat.
keywords.bugmilk: It's delicious. Brasith sells it in his store.
keywords.bow: Bow, arrow, and spear are the hunters' best friends. In the northeast of the town one of us may sell such tools.
keywords.arrow: Bow, arrow, and spear are the hunters' best friends. In the northeast of the town one of us may sell such tools.
keywords.spear: Bow, arrow, and spear are the hunters' best friends. In the northeast of the town one of us may sell such tools.
keywords.elf: That is the race to which I belong.
keywords.elves: That is the race to which I belong.
keywords.dwarf: I will never understand these little people of the mountains.
keywords.human: The humans are a loud and ugly race. They lack any grace and are more kin to the orcs then to us.
keywords.troll: I despise their presence in our town, but it may be a necessary evil.
keywords.cenath: The magic they wield is all that matters to them.
keywords.kuridai: The Kuridai are too agressive not only to people but also to the enviroment. They lack any understanding of the balance that we know as nature.
keywords.deraisim: We try to live in harmony with the forces of nature, may they be living or unliving.
keywords.abdaisim: The Abdaisim are our brothers and sisters in spirit. We stay in contact with them, exchanging news and items.
keywords.teshial: If they ever existed they are gone now.
keywords.ferumbras: The defiler. I will not talk about him.
keywords.crunor: I guess it's a human god for the human sight of nature. I have not much knowledge of this entity.

texts: I am the mistress of the hunt. At this place you may buy the food our hunts provide.

entries.response: Sorry, you do not have enough gold.
Maybe you will buy it another time.
